steps.title: Use the colon definition
steps.content: The phrase after the colon defines the missing word: the source of a claim "has no direct bearing on whether the claim is true." The blank must mean not connected to the truth of the claim.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: A means implied, but the issue is logical bearing, not whether the source is stated. B means unquestionable, which is not the point. C means unclear, but the source's clarity is not discussed. The answer is D.
